description: Update prisma/data/meta-parts.ts with comprehensive, correctly-attributed Hasbro and Takara Tomy Beyblade X parts based on authoritative Beyblade Wiki data scraped from the Fandom API.
steps: Update the `wikiBladeNames` array (Takara Tomy Basic Line blades) to include ALL blades from the wiki Basic Line that have a Takara Tomy name. Add missing ones: ShinobiKnife, SharkGill (TT name for Gill Shark), CrocCrunch (TT name for Bite Croc), TyrannoRoar, BearScratch, SamuraiSteel, GoatTackle, PteraSwing, MammothTusk, ShinobiShadow (already in list), DragoonStorm, StormPegasis, VictoryValkyrie, Trypio.

Update the `wikiHasbroOnlyBladeNames` array to contain ONLY blades where the Takara Tomy name is N/A on the wiki. Based on wiki data: 'Hack Viking' and 'Stun Medusa' are true Hasbro exclusives (N/A for TT). 'Clamp Crab' and 'Yell Kong' from Basic Line Hasbro Debut are also Hasbro-exclusive (N/A for TT). Remove blades that actually have TT equivalents: BatGust, TriceraSpiky, CyclopsEye, DranStrike, HeavensRing, SiegSuperion, DranzerSpiral, DrigerSlash, DracielShield, Lightning L-Drago variants, Rock Leone, StormSpriggan, XenoXcalibur all have TT names and should be in wikiBladeNames instead.

Add a new `wikiHasbroDebutBladeNames` array for blades that debuted under Hasbro but also have Takara Tomy names (they are primarily Hasbro-manufactured but not exclusive). These include: BatGust, TriceraSpiky, CyclopsEye, DranStrike, HeavensRing, SiegSuperion. The wiki shows these under 'Hasbro Debut' sections but with valid TT names. Set their manufacturer to HASBRO since Hasbro debuted them.

Add missing Unique Line ratchet-integrated blades to the data: HellsNether (TT), and Hasbro-exclusive ones: CutterShinobi, RampartAegis, SeizeJaguar, ValorBison. Add them as UX_EXPANDED series with ratchetIntegration: BLADE.

Update the `uxBladeNames` Set to include all UX (Unique Line) blades that are NOT ratchet-integrated and not already in other sets. Ensure it contains: AeroPegasus, ClockMirage, DranBuster, ImpactDrake, MeteorDragoon, PhoenixRudder, SharkScale, SilverWolf, WhaleWave, WizardRod (already there). Add missing UX blades from wiki: GhostCircle, GolemRock, HellsHammer, KnightMail, LeonCrest, MummyCurse, OrochiCluster, SamuraiSaber, ScorpioSpear, ShinobiShadow.
Update the `uxExpandedBladeNames` Set to include all UX-Expanded (ratchet-integrated) blades: BulletGriffon, GloryValkyrie (both TT). Also add HellsNether as TT.
Fix the `bxExpandedBladeNames` Set. The wiki shows 'Expand Blades' in Basic Line: CyclopsEye, DranStrike, HeavensRing, SiegSuperion. Keep DranStrike, add CyclopsEye, HeavensRing, SiegSuperion.
Update the `wikiRatchetNames` array to include all ratchets from both Basic Line and Unique Line wiki pages. Add missing: 3-85, 4-50. Ensure no duplicates with cxRatchetNames.

Update the `wikiBitNames` array to add missing bits from wiki: Low Point, Low Flat (from Basic Line Bits), Disk Ball (correct name per wiki, not 'Discball'). Remove 'Discball' and add 'Disk Ball' instead.

Update the Custom Line data: add new lock chips from wiki: Tiga, Valkyrie (TT name), Bucks (TT name for Stag). Add new metal blades: Hurricane, Tread. Add new over blades: I, T. Remove 'Stag' from lock chips (TT name is 'Bucks'). Note: Keep existing Stag entry but add Bucks and Tiga and Valkyrie as separate entries since the current code uses these as display names.
Update `cxMetalBladeNames` to add Hurricane and Tread. Update `cxOverBladeNames` to add I and T. Add Tiga, Bucks, and Valkyrie to `cxLockChipNames`.

Fix manufacturer attribution in the hand-curated `metaParts` array: (a) Hover Wyvern has a TT name WyvernHover per wiki - it debuted as Hasbro but also exists as TT. Keep as HASBRO since it debuted there. (b) Wizard Arrow - per wiki it's a standard Basic Line blade with both TT and Hasbro names, so it should be TAKARA_TOMY (it was originally launched by TT as BX-03). Fix from HASBRO to TAKARA_TOMY. (c) ratchet-4-60 is attributed to HASBRO but 4-60 appears in the Basic Line ratchets on wiki which are all shared TT/Hasbro parts - change to TAKARA_TOMY. (d) bit-point is attributed to HASBRO but Point appears in the Basic Line bits list - change to TAKARA_TOMY.

Ensure the Hasbro-exclusive ratchet-integrated blades are added to the metaParts array or a new dedicated array with proper attributes: CutterShinobi, RampartAegis, SeizeJaguar, ValorBison (all HASBRO, UX_EXPANDED, ratchetIntegration: BLADE).
Verify the combined allMetaParts export still works: it should spread metaParts (with applyMetaPartMetadata), cxGeneratedParts, and wikiGeneratedParts, then deduplicate by type:slug key.
acceptance_criteria: Running `npx tsc --noEmit` in the project root produces no TypeScript errors
The wikiHasbroOnlyBladeNames array contains ONLY blades where TT name is N/A on the wiki (true Hasbro exclusives)
All Takara Tomy Basic Line and Unique Line blades with TT names are in wikiBladeNames
Ratchet-integrated blades (Bullet Griffon, Glory Valkyrie, Hells Nether for TT; Cutter Shinobi, Rampart Aegis, Seize Jaguar, Valor Bison for Hasbro) are properly represented
All CX line parts including new wiki discoveries (Tiga, Hurricane, Tread, Over Blade I, Over Blade T, Valkyrie, Bucks) are included
Manufacturer attributions are correct: Wizard Arrow and 4-60 ratchet and Point bit are TAKARA_TOMY, not HASBRO
All ratchets from wiki (including 3-85 and 4-50) are present
Bit name 'Discball' is corrected to 'Disk Ball' per wiki
The file compiles without errors and allMetaParts export works correctly
verification: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to confirm no TypeScript compilation errors
Run `node -e "const m = require('./prisma/data/meta-parts'); console.log('Total parts:', m.allMetaParts.length)"` via tsx to verify the module loads and exports correctly
